title: Incorrect grouping by GROUP BY with timezone
poc: select date(from_unixtime(date_received)) as dt, count(distinct pid) FROM test2 GROUP by dt;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY behavior affected by timezone setting
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test3 (date_received int unsigned NOT NULL, pid int unsigned NOT NULL, status ENUM('active', 'inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active') ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
SELECT DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(date_received)) AS dt, COUNT(DISTINCT pid) FROM test3 GROUP BY dt;
